MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk Carla Contreras, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Jane Hamataka, is present.
Attorney, Michael Joseph Raifsnider, appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, Ray Ramirez, is present.
Attorney, Jill Rowe, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date of October 14, 2008 is confirmed.
